top_ops_issues.title: OTA channel mix overweight at 3 Florida resorts
top_ops_issues.detail: Booking.com share at Naples, Key West, Fort Lauderdale resorts is running 41% of summer pace vs 28% target. Commission drag ~$1.8M / quarter if not corrected.

top_ops_issues.title: Pricing agent flagged 17 properties below comp-set on shoulder dates
top_ops_issues.detail: Dynamic-pricing model recommends $14–$28 ADR lift on midweek shoulder nights. Awaiting RM approval — 9 properties have auto-accept enabled.

top_ops_issues.title: NPS dipped 4 pts at Concord Express portfolio
top_ops_issues.detail: Top complaint: front-desk wait time >7 min during 6–9pm check-in. Salesforce Service Cloud cases up 22% MoM.
